Second Amended Ntc Of Hearing On Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-25-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT AMERICAN BOARD OF FORENSIC DOCUMENT EXAMINERS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT is granted. Plaintiff has failed to establish a basis for asserting jurisdiction over defendant. The facts in this case are analogous to the decision in Fontanetta v. American Board of Internal Medicine 2nd Cir. (1970) 421 F. 2nd 355. The motion is timely. Olinick v. BMG Entertainment (2006) 138 Cal. App. 4TH 1286, 1295-96. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
